text.title: Risk Register Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to maintain a register through one weekly cycle.

step.name: scaffold
step.action: Create the register file with header + columns; assign register-owner.
step.output: Empty register skeleton committed to repo

step.name: populate
step.action: Insert one row per risk with all 12 mandatory columns; cite evidence per score.
step.decision-gate: Reject if any mandatory column empty or evidence missing.

step.name: review
step.action: Walk each active row; update P/I if evidence changed; flag stale rows; rotate owners if needed.
step.output: Reviewed register with updated last_reviewed dates

step.name: reconcile
step.action: For materialised risks, set status=closed_materialized + outcome note. For passed risks, status=closed_passed.
step.decision-gate: Reject deletions; reverse and use closure status instead.

step.name: publish
step.action: Commit to repo; share top-5 active risks on weekly status report.
